title: Root Layout Component (app/layout.tsx)
content:
This file defines the root layout for the Next.js application. It sets up global styles, font definitions, and integrates with Clerk for authentication.

**Purpose:**

*   Provides the fundamental HTML structure for all pages.
*   Applies global CSS classes for styling and dark mode.
*   Loads and configures Geist Sans and Geist Mono fonts.
*   Initializes the Clerk authentication provider.

**Key Features & Exports:**

*   **`metadata` Object:** Defines the title and description for the application, which are used by the browser tab and search engines.
*   **Font Configuration:** Uses `next/font/google` to import and configure `Geist` and `Geist_Mono` fonts, assigning them CSS variables for global use.
*   **`ClerkProvider`:** Wraps the entire application to enable Clerk's authentication services.
*   **Root HTML and Body Elements:** Sets up the main `<html>` and `<body>` tags with necessary attributes (`lang`, `className`) and global styles (e.g., `h-full`, `antialiased`, `dark`, `min-h-full`, `flex`, `flex-col`).
*   **`RootLayout` Component:** A React component that accepts `children` (the page content) and renders it within the established layout structure.

**Usage:**

The `RootLayout` component is automatically used by Next.js to wrap all pages in the application. Developers do not need to explicitly import or use this component in other parts of the application. Any changes made here will affect the overall structure and styling of the entire site.
